site.name: ForThePeople.in
site.tagline: Your District. Your Data. Your Right.
site.disclaimer: ForThePeople.in is an independent citizen transparency initiative. This is NOT an official government website. All data is sourced from publicly available government portals under India's Open Data Policy (NDSAP).

map.title: India — Select Your District
map.sectionHint: Click a live district to explore, or request one that is still locked
map.boundariesQueuedBody: We have public sources identified; this state needs a normalized GeoJSON file.

requestCard.title: Expanding to 780+ districts
requestCard.subtitle: Tell us which district should go live next.
requestCard.empty: No public requests yet. Pick a state and nominate the next district to launch.
requestCard.instructions: Choose a state first, then pick one district still waiting to go live.
requestCard.coveredHint: All known districts in {state} are already live. Pick another state or vote on upcoming features.
requestCard.submitError: Could not submit your district request right now. Please try again.

stats.fallbackStatus: Showing district coverage while local homepage stats reconnect.
stats.liveStatus: Data refreshes every 5-30 minutes from official government portals.

preview.noActiveDistrictsStatus: No active districts are available in the local database yet. Showing static coverage only.
preview.fallbackStatus: Showing district coverage while live homepage feeds reconnect.
preview.liveStatus: Live homepage cards refresh as new district data lands.
preview.cropsEmpty: Awaiting the latest market-day crop sync for active districts.
preview.damsEmpty: Awaiting the first dam-level sync for active districts.
preview.newsEmpty: No recent district headlines are available yet.
preview.weatherOverflow: +{count} more active districts in the full weather dashboard
preview.weatherEmpty: Awaiting the first weather reading for active districts.

emptyState.message: Official district data for {module} is still being connected.
emptyState.availableSoon: This module appears here once official district data is available.

noDataCard.title: Data being prepared
noDataCard.body: {module} data for {district} is still being added from official district and state sources.
noDataCard.note: ForThePeople.in republishes public-source government data and shows this module once verified district data is available.

alerts.title: Alert feed not live yet
alerts.body: We have not connected a verified alert feed for {district} yet. This card stays quiet until an official district source is available.

power.title: Power outage feed being connected
power.body: {module} for {district} is still being connected from {source}. Use the official portal in the meantime.

transport.title: Transport data being connected
transport.body: {module} for {district} is still being connected from {source} and public rail sources.

urban.title: Not applicable for this urban district
urban.body: {module} is primarily a rural-data surface, so {district} does not show a district feed here.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This page doesn't exist, or the district / module you're looking for hasn't been added yet.

banner.refreshing: Contributor count is refreshing. The leaderboard is still available.
banner.unavailable: Contributor count is temporarily unavailable. The leaderboard is still available.
banner.empty: No public supporters are visible yet. Be the first to back India's data revolution.
banner.supportersSuffix: people already backing India's data revolution

footer.disclaimer: Independent citizen initiative. NOT an official government website. Data under NDSAP.
